infrastructureBaseURL.description: Backend-only override for the New Relic Infrastructure API base URL. Used for internal testing and mocking; not exposed in the configuration editor.

nerdGraphBaseURL.description: Backend-only override for the New Relic NerdGraph (GraphQL) API base URL. Used for internal testing and mocking; not exposed in the configuration editor.

restBaseURL.description: Backend-only override for the New Relic REST API base URL. Used for internal testing and mocking; not exposed in the configuration editor.

timeoutInSeconds.description: Enter the timeout in seconds. Defaults to 300
